recommendations.title: Bones
recommendations.overview: Over 20 years after his death, local legend and benefactor Jimmy Bones returns as a ghost to get revenge on those who killed him and restore his neighborhood.

recommendations.title: Never Die Alone
recommendations.overview: A drug kingpin's rise and tragic fall is witnessed vicariously by a reporter who uses the criminal's diary as the basis for his new book.

recommendations.title: Surviving the Game
recommendations.overview: A homeless man is hired as a survival guide for a group of wealthy businessmen on a hunting trip in the mountains, unaware that they are killers who hunt humans for sport, and that he is their new prey.

recommendations.title: Nine Queens
recommendations.overview: Two con artists try to swindle a stamp collector by selling him a sheet of counterfeit rare stamps, the "nine queens".

recommendations.title: Burnt Offerings
recommendations.overview: A family moves into a large old mansion in the countryside which seems to have a mysterious and sinister power over its new residents.
